hud.streakAtRiskTitle: Clear a step today so your streak survives.

workbench.title: Your prompt bench.
workbench.body: Free space to test prompts. No XP, no rubric, no penalty for retrying — just you, the model, and the loop. Forge keeps your last six runs so you can compare versions.

practice.title: Practice replays.
practice.body: Echo is calibrating a review mode: past drills with fresh variations to keep your reflexes sharp. Not open yet — check back when Echo gives the green light.

crew.title: Meet your crew.
crew.body: Soon you'll be able to read each member's full dossier — Vega, Atlas, Echo, Forge — backstory, specialty, recurring lines. For now you meet them inside the lessons.

leaderboard.title: Fleet leaderboard.
leaderboard.body: Atlas is crunching weekly rankings — who keeps their streak, who clears the most capstones, who hangs onto their hearts. First publish drops once there's enough fleet.

shop.title: Base shop.
shop.body: Vega is haggling with the quartermaster: insignia cosmetics, heart refills, tokens for extra retries. Hold onto your gems — opens soon.

hero.subheading: A team of humanoid robots is counting on you. Each one has a specialty — and they only understand you if you know how to talk to them. This is where you learn the protocol: prompt engineering, step by step.

prompts.title: Talk to the model
prompts.body: Structure, context, examples. The basics that separate a useful answer from a hallucination.

tools.title: Give the model hands
tools.body: Functions, schemas, validation. The model stops guessing and starts acting.

mcp.title: Wire it to the world
mcp.body: MCP servers, resources, permissions. Your agent reads, writes, and queries real systems.

agents.title: Make it coordinate itself
agents.body: Loops, memory, task splits. From an assistant that answers to one that ships.

crewPreview.subtitle: Four robots, four styles. Each one teaches part of the protocol and calls you out when you drift.

blurbs.vega: Welcomes you aboard. Teaches you to give an order that can't be misread.
blurbs.echo: Speaks in checklists. Verifies data and demands clean formats.
blurbs.atlas: Signs off your first report. Wants tight structure, no noise.
blurbs.forge: Builds the ship's tools. Explains exactly how every piece works.

drill.title: Quick drill
drill.body: Two minutes: mark what you know, reinforce what you don't. No blank screens, no loose theory.

build.title: Build the prompt
build.body: Write, tune, test. Echo runs it against real cases and tells you exactly what failed.

ship.title: Capstone with the crew
ship.body: Put it all together on a real mission. The crew signs off your work and unlocks the next shift.

finalCta.title: Ready for your first shift?
finalCta.body: Zero setup. Jump in, finish the first drill, and we'll see you on the bridge.

list.subheading: Each track is a series of steps with the crew member who owns that protocol. Mix freely — Echo's checklist is unlocked from your first hello.

debrief.title: By end of shift, you can —
points: Read a model's mood from its first sentence
Pick the right role for the right turn
Spec a JSON schema Echo will sign off on
Clear a capstone with hearts to spare

doItems: Read a short scene — Vega vs. Echo on the bridge
Drag two examples into a prompt skeleton
Run the prompt; let Echo grade 3 cases

dashboard.heading: Your progress
dashboard.signInToTrack: Sign in to save your progress between sessions.

continue.title: Pick up where you left off —
continue.body: Vega is waiting on the bridge. Two minutes of drill, then Echo runs your prompt against three cases.

quests.title: DAILY QUESTS
quests.passDrills: Pass 3 drills with no hearts lost

fieldGuide.title: FIELD GUIDE
fieldGuide.vegaTip: Easy. Show the model two examples before asking. It will copy your shape — that's the whole trick.
fieldGuide.tipBody: If the model invents a field, your prompt is leaking. Tighten the schema.

banner.title: Welcome back, Officer. {mentor} has prepped your shift.
banner.statusBody: Status: {online} · 3 quests pending · capstone in 2 steps

anon.heading: Bridge closed
anon.body: Sign in to access your bridge — your progress, your next shift, and the crew you'll work with all live there.

greet.messageInProgress: You have <accent>a pending practice</accent> from yesterday — and I want it clean.
greet.messageNextUp: <accent>A new shift</accent> is queued on your path.
greet.messageDone: You've cleared everything available. <accent>Waiting on the next track</accent>.

daily.title: Spot the bug × 3
daily.body: Fix three fuzzy prompts before Echo flags them. Forge gives Forge-tokens.

capstone.title: "Talk your way past the bridge"
capstone.body: Atlas is waiting. Pass Few-shot and Schemas first.

messages.vega: Ready whenever you are. No rush.
messages.forge: I'm wiring up tools. Don't break the bench.

activity.empty: No activity yet. Start a shift and it'll show up here.

badges.heading: Crew badges
badges.empty: Close every step of a course to earn your first badge.

journal.heading: Shift journal
journal.empty: Your journal is empty. Every closed shift gets logged here.

sample.openerByPersona: Hi. I'm here to help with this lesson. Ask anything — I can see the step and your prompt.
sample.userQuestion: Why does Echo sometimes respond with preamble instead of one word?
sample.personaAnswer:
Classic behavior — "preamble". The model defaults to adding context before answering. Three ways to stop it:

1. Tell it explicitly "ONE word only".
2. End the prompt with an incomplete scaffold: Classification:
3. Add a spam example — your prompt only has urgent and normal right now.

The cheapest fix is (2). Want me to show you how it looks?

errors.unauthorized: Sign in to save your attempts.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts today. Try again tomorrow.
errors.invalidInput: The submitted answer is not valid.
errors.modelError: The model didn't respond. Try again.
errors.network: Something went wrong submitting your answer. Try again.

assemble.label: REORDER THE BLOCKS
assemble.task: Reorder the blocks so Echo reads them top-to-bottom and knows what to do.
assemble.failed: Echo found blocks out of place.

anatomy.label: CLICK TO LABEL
anatomy.question: Tag each block of the prompt. Tap a slot to cycle the labels.
anatomy.passed: Labels are correct. Echo signs off.

ab.label: MCQ · NO COST
ab.rubricHint: Look for: closed contract, explicit fallback, scaffold at the end.

tagFill.label: FILL THE SLOT · 1 HOLE
tagFill.question: Edit the content between the tags of the prompt.

prompt.label: Your transmission
prompt.hint: use {token} where the input should go

crew.label: Echo diagnosis
crew.promptTask: The test is not checking whether the prompt sounds nice. It checks whether it produces consistent outputs across several cases. Change one thing per attempt and compare the telemetry.
crew.promptTaskPassed: Clean run. Echo logged every case.

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.placeholder: Write a prompt and run the transmission

output.label: Response
output.empty: Run a transmission to see the output.

crew.label: Echo note
crew.defaultNote: Run several versions of the same prompt and compare what changed in the output. The real practice is noticing which part of your instruction caused each response.

history.label: Transmission history
history.empty: No runs yet. Run the prompt to save a local version.

conversation.emptyTranscript: The conversation starts when you send your first message.
conversation.inputPlaceholder: Type your message and send with ⌘/Ctrl+Enter
conversation.noTurnsLeft: No turns left. Check the conversation.

errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts today. Try again tomorrow.
errors.model_error: The model couldn't respond. Try again.
errors.network: Something went wrong sending the message. Try again.

debrief.title: Mission cleared.
debrief.subtitle: Good shift, officer. {officer} signed off — you rose from Ensign to Lieutenant Jr.

toolDesc.instruction: Edit the description of {tool} so the agent knows when to call it.
toolDesc.failed: Key phrases are missing from the description.

mcpDebug.question: Look at the spec. What's the most likely reason the agent never picks this tool?
mcpDebug.failed: Echo points to a different root cause.

checks.json:invalid: The output is not valid JSON.
checks.json:not-object: The JSON is not an object.
checks.regex:no-match: The output format doesn't match what was expected.
checks.contains:not-found: The output doesn't contain the expected text.
checks.length:too-short: The output is shorter than expected ({len} characters).
checks.length:too-long: The output is longer than expected ({len} characters).
checks.xml-malformed: The XML is not well-formed (an unclosed tag).
checks.task-model:error: The model failed to produce an output. Try again.
checks.judge:rate-limited: The automated grader is overloaded. Try again in a minute.
checks.judge:invalid-shape: The automated grader returned an unexpected response.
checks.judge:unknown-error: The automated grader had an unknown problem.
checks.skipped:deterministic-failed: Pending — fix the prior criteria first.
